description: Use this API routine to disconnect the specified induction machine from the bus to which it is currently connected, and reconnect it to a designated bus. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = moveindmac(ibus, id, newbus, newid)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus to which induction machine id is connected. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Machine identifier of the induction machine to be moved. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: newbus
parameters.description: Number of the bus to which the induction machine is to be moved. (input; ID by default).

parameters.name: newid
parameters.description: New induction machine identifier to be assigned to the relocated induction machine. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: IBUS and NEWBUS are the same bus.
induction machine NEWID at bus NEWBUS already exists.
invalid new identifier; must not be blank.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
